issue_title: Ready phase enforcement — prevent branch-local artifacts from reaching main

transitions.human_approval: User approved on 2026-04-09 — 'laten we voor nu overgang naar design fase forceren'
transitions.skip_reason: Refactor workflow does not include a design phase by default. Design phase is required for this issue: the Expected Results framework must be elaborated into concrete YAML structures, Pydantic model shape, tool contracts, and loader behavior before implementation cycles can be defined.
Design phase is not part of the refactor workflow; design is complete (FINAL status) and planning is the next logical phase.
QA v2 found 17 violations (8 CRITICAL) including ADR breaches, architectural regressions, and test blast radius. Design must be revised to v2.0 before planning can continue.
Design phase not part of refactor workflow; design v2.0 is FINAL after QA GO verdict.
